TYPES.FPCLINE: types : ZTT_VEPO1 type table of t_vepo,
types : it_finaldata type table of ty_final1.

INITIALIZATION.FPCLINE: ** set textnames for header, adress and footer
****** INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE it_vepo
***** FROM lips INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF @lw_lips
***** SELECT SINGLE vbeln posnr pstyv matnr matkl
****** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
***** READ TABLE lv_lines INTO wa_lines INDEX 1.
*****" Unit weight and Net Weight should be
*****DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM it_vbfa1 COMPARING vbelv.
***** READ TABLE it_vbfa1 into data(wa_vbfa1) INDEX 1.
***** READ TABLE it_vbfa1 into data(wa_vbfa2) INDEX 2.
***** READ TABLE it_vbfa1 into data(wa_vbfa3) INDEX 3.
***** READ TABLE it_vbfa1 into data(wa_vbfa4) INDEX 4.
***** READ TABLE it_vbfa1 into data(wa_vbfa5) INDEX 5.
***** READ TABLE it_vbfa1 into data(wa_vbfa6) INDEX 6.
***** READ TABLE it_vbfa1 into data(wa_vbfa7) INDEX 7.
***** READ TABLE it_vbfa1 into data(wa_vbfa8) INDEX 8.
***** READ TABLE it_vbfa1 into data(wa_vbfa9) INDEX 9.
***** CONCATENATE 'FAX : ' wa_adrc1-fax_number INTO lv_fax SEPARATED BY ' '..
******SELECT SINGLE ERDAT FROM likp INTO WA_LIKP11
*****SELECT SINGLE adrnr FROM kna1 INTO lv_adrnr
***** SELECT SINGLE * FROM t005u INTO gs_ku_t005u
***** SELECT SINGLE landx FROM t005t INTO gv_ku_landx
***** SELECT SINGLE * FROM adrc INTO gs_pl_adrc
***** SELECT SINGLE landx FROM t005t INTO gv_pl_landx
***** SELECT SINGLE * FROM t005u INTO gs_pl_t005u
***** SELECT SINGLE j_1iexcd FROM j_1imocomp INTO gv_pl_1iexcd
***** SELECT SINGLE VSART ZTERM INCO1 INCO2
***** ERDAT FROM likp INTO TABLE it_likp
***** SELECT SINGLE ERDAT FROM likp INTO WA_LIKP11
**** SELECT * FROM VEKP INTO TABLE GT_VEKP
***** set textnames for header, adress and footer
***** INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE it_vepo
**** SELECT SINGLE * FROM adrc INTO gs_pl_adrc
**** SELECT SINGLE landx FROM t005t INTO gv_pl_landx
**** SELECT SINGLE * FROM t005u INTO gs_pl_t005u
**** SELECT SINGLE j_1iexcd FROM j_1imocomp INTO gv_pl_1iexcd
**** SELECT SINGLE vsart zterm inco1 inco2
**** erdat FROM likp INTO TABLE it_likp
****DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM it_vbfa1 COMPARING vbelv.
**** CONCATENATE sales_ord1 ',' sales_ord2 ',' sales_ord3 INTO sales_ordt .
****SELECT SINGLE kunnr FROM vbpa INTO l_kunnr
**** CONCATENATE 'FAX : ' wa_adrc1-fax_number INTO lv_fax SEPARATED BY ' '..
*****SELECT SINGLE ERDAT FROM likp INTO WA_LIKP11
****SELECT SINGLE adrnr FROM kna1 INTO lv_adrnr
**** SELECT SINGLE * FROM t005u INTO gs_ku_t005u
**** SELECT SINGLE landx FROM t005t INTO gv_ku_landx
**** SELECT SINGLE erdat FROM likp INTO wa_likp11
**** CONCATENATE lv_text ls_line-tdline INTO lv_text SEPARATED BY space.
**** CONCATENATE lv_text ls_line-tdline INTO lv_text SEPARATED BY space.
**** CONCATENATE lv_text ls_line-tdline INTO lv_text SEPARATED BY space.
**** CONCATENATE lv_text ls_line-tdline INTO lv_text SEPARATED BY space.
**** CONCATENATE lv_text ls_line-tdline INTO lv_text SEPARATED BY space.
**** SELECT SINGLE vbeln posnr pstyv matnr matkl
**** SELECT SINGLE matnr lfimg brgew ntgew
**** SELECT SINGLE * FROM mara INTO gv_mara
**** SELECT SINGLE * FROM vbrp INTO wa_vbrp
***** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
**** READ TABLE lv_lines INTO wa_lines INDEX 1.
**** " Unit weight and Net Weight should be
**** CONCATENATE lv_text ls_line-tdline INTO lv_text SEPARATED BY space.
****" Remove the decimal point if it’s the last character
**** SPLIT ls_final-wa_vepo_vemng1 AT '.' INTO ls_final-wa_vepo_vemng1 lv_decimal.
**** CONCATENATE lv_text ls_line-tdline INTO lv_text SEPARATED BY space.
**** CONCATENATE lv_text ls_line-tdline INTO lv_text SEPARATED BY space.
SELECT SINGLE * FROM VBFA INTO LS_VBFA
SELECT SINGLE * FROM VBRK INTO GS_VBRK
* set textnames for header, adress and footer
* INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE it_vepo
INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE IT_VEPO
FROM LIPS INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF @LW_LIPS
SELECT SINGLE * FROM ADRC INTO GS_PL_ADRC
SELECT SINGLE LANDX FROM T005T INTO GV_PL_LANDX
SELECT SINGLE * FROM T005U INTO GS_PL_T005U
SELECT SINGLE J_1IEXCD FROM J_1IMOCOMP INTO GV_PL_1IEXCD
DATA : IT_SO TYPE TABLE OF T_VBELV.
SELECT SINGLE VSART ZTERM INCO1 INCO2
ERDAT FROM LIKP INTO TABLE IT_LIKP
READ TABLE IT_LIKP INTO WA_LIKP INDEX 1.
DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM IT_VBFA1 COMPARING VBELV.
READ TABLE IT_VBFA1 INTO DATA(WA_VBFA1) INDEX 1.
READ TABLE IT_VBFA1 INTO DATA(WA_VBFA2) INDEX 2.
READ TABLE IT_VBFA1 INTO DATA(WA_VBFA3) INDEX 3.
READ TABLE IT_VBFA1 INTO DATA(WA_VBFA4) INDEX 4.
READ TABLE IT_VBFA1 INTO DATA(WA_VBFA5) INDEX 5.
READ TABLE IT_VBFA1 INTO DATA(WA_VBFA6) INDEX 6.
READ TABLE IT_VBFA1 INTO DATA(WA_VBFA7) INDEX 7.
READ TABLE IT_VBFA1 INTO DATA(WA_VBFA8) INDEX 8.
READ TABLE IT_VBFA1 INTO DATA(WA_VBFA9) INDEX 9.
CONCATENATE SALES_ORD1 ',' SALES_ORD2 ',' SALES_ORD3 INTO SALES_ORDT .
SELECT SINGLE KUNNR FROM VBPA INTO L_KUNNR
CONCATENATE 'FAX : ' WA_ADRC1-FAX_NUMBER INTO LV_FAX SEPARATED BY ' '..
*SELECT SINGLE ERDAT FROM likp INTO WA_LIKP11
SELECT SINGLE ADRNR FROM KNA1 INTO LV_ADRNR
SELECT SINGLE * FROM T005U INTO GS_KU_T005U
SELECT SINGLE LANDX FROM T005T INTO GV_KU_LANDX
SELECT SINGLE ERDAT FROM LIKP INTO WA_LIKP11
DATA : LT_LINES TYPE TABLE OF TLINE.
LO_TEXT_READER->READ_TEXT_STRING( EXPORTING ID = 'Z007' NAME = LV_NAME1 OBJECT = 'VBBK' IMPORTING LV_LINES = LV_LINES1 ).
** CONCATENATE LV_SPACE1 LV_SPACE2 INTO LV_SPACE SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
** delete LT_LINES WHERE TDLINE IS INITIAL.
** LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
** CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
CLEAR : LV_TEXTNAME , LT_LINES, LV_LINE, LV_LATRS, LV_SPACE, LV_LENGTH, LV_LATRS1,LV_SAFE_LEN.
LO_TEXT_READER->READ_TEXT_STRING( EXPORTING ID = 'Z008' NAME = LV_NAME1 OBJECT = 'VBBK' IMPORTING LV_LINES = LV_LINES1 ).
** CONCATENATE LV_SPACE1 LV_SPACE2 INTO LV_SPACE SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
** delete LT_LINES WHERE TDLINE IS INITIAL.
** LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
** CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
CLEAR : LT_LINES, LV_LINE, LV_LATRS, LV_SPACE, LV_LENGTH, LV_LATRS1,LV_SAFE_LEN.
LO_TEXT_READER->READ_TEXT_STRING( EXPORTING ID = 'Z006' NAME = LV_NAME1 OBJECT = 'VBBK' IMPORTING LV_LINES = LV_LINES1 ).
** CONCATENATE LV_SPACE1 LV_SPACE2 INTO LV_SPACE SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
** delete LT_LINES WHERE TDLINE IS INITIAL.
** LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
** CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
CLEAR : LT_LINES, LV_LINE, LV_LATRS, LV_SPACE, LV_LENGTH, LV_LATRS1,LV_SAFE_LEN.
LO_TEXT_READER->READ_TEXT_STRING( EXPORTING ID = 'Z010' NAME = LV_NAME1 OBJECT = 'VBBK' IMPORTING LV_LINES = LV_LINES1 ).
** CONCATENATE LV_SPACE1 LV_SPACE2 INTO LV_SPACE SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
** delete LT_LINES WHERE TDLINE IS INITIAL.
** LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
** CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
CLEAR : LT_LINES, LV_LINE, LV_LATRS, LV_SPACE, LV_LENGTH, LV_LATRS1,LV_SAFE_LEN.
LO_TEXT_READER->READ_TEXT_STRING( EXPORTING ID = 'Z040' NAME = LV_NAME1 OBJECT = 'VBBK' IMPORTING LV_LINES = LV_LINES1 ).
*** CONCATENATE LV_SPACE1 LV_SPACE2 INTO LV_SPACE SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
** delete LT_LINES WHERE TDLINE IS INITIAL.
** LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
** CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
** CONCATENATE LV_NOTIFY <LS_LINES4>-tdline INTO LV_NOTIFY SEPARATED BY cl_abap_char_utilities=>newline.
****lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = 'Z040' name = LV_NAME1 object = 'VBBK' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
** CONCATENATE LV_SPACE1 LV_SPACE2 INTO LV_SPACE SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
** DELETE LT_LINES WHERE TDLINE IS INITIAL.
** LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
** CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
** "CONCATENATE LV_NOTIFY <LS_LINES4>-tdline INTO LV_NOTIFY SEPARATED BY cl_abap_char_utilities=>newline.
CLEAR : LT_LINES, LV_LINE, LV_LATRS, LV_SPACE, LV_LENGTH, LV_LATRS1,LV_SAFE_LEN.
LO_TEXT_READER->READ_TEXT_STRING( EXPORTING ID = 'Z033' NAME = LV_NAME1 OBJECT = 'VBBK' IMPORTING LV_LINES = LV_LINES1 ).
** CONCATENATE LV_SPACE1 LV_SPACE2 INTO LV_SPACE SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
** delete LT_LINES WHERE TDLINE IS INITIAL.
** LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
** CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
DATA LV_LINES TYPE TABLE OF TLINE.
SELECT SINGLE VBELN POSNR PSTYV MATNR MATKL
SELECT SINGLE MATNR LFIMG BRGEW NTGEW
SELECT SINGLE * FROM MARA INTO GV_MARA
SELECT SINGLE * FROM VBRP INTO WA_VBRP
CLEAR : LV_LINE, LV_LATRS, LV_SPACE, LV_LENGTH, LV_LATRS1,LV_SAFE_LEN.
*** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
** READ TABLE lv_lines INTO wa_lines INDEX 1.
** LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
** CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
LO_TEXT_READER->READ_TEXT_STRING( EXPORTING ID = '0010' NAME = LV_NAME OBJECT = 'VBBP' IMPORTING LV_LINES = LV_LINES1 ).
* Unit weight and Net Weight should be
CLEAR : LT_LINES, LV_LINE, LV_LATRS, LV_SPACE, LV_LENGTH, LV_LATRS1,LV_SAFE_LEN.
LO_TEXT_READER->READ_TEXT_STRING( EXPORTING ID = '0001' NAME = LV_TEXTNAME OBJECT = 'VBBP' IMPORTING LV_LINES = LV_LINES1 ).
** LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
** CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
** CONCATENATE LV_TEXT LS_LINE-TDLINE INTO LV_TEXT SEPARATED BY SPACE.
" Remove the decimal point if it’s the last character
SPLIT LS_FINAL-WA_VEPO_VEMNG1 AT '.' INTO LS_FINAL-WA_VEPO_VEMNG1 LV_DECIMAL.
SPLIT LV_TOTAL AT '.' INTO LV_TOTAL LV_DECIMAL.
SPLIT LV_TOTAL AT '.' INTO LV_TOTAL LV_DECIMAL.
CLEAR : LT_LINES, LV_LINE, LV_LATRS, LV_SPACE, LV_LENGTH, LV_LATRS1,LV_SAFE_LEN.
LO_TEXT_READER->READ_TEXT_STRING( EXPORTING ID = 'ST' NAME = LV_TEXTNAME OBJECT = 'TEXT' IMPORTING LV_LINES = LV_LINES1 ).
** LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
** CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
** CONCATENATE LV_TEXT LS_LINE-TDLINE INTO LV_TEXT SEPARATED BY SPACE.
SELECT SINGLE FROM VBFA FIELDS VBELN
CLEAR : LT_LINES, LV_LINE, LV_LATRS, LV_SPACE, LV_LENGTH, LV_LATRS1,LV_SAFE_LEN.
LO_TEXT_READER->READ_TEXT_STRING( EXPORTING ID = 'Z040' NAME = LV_TEXTNAME OBJECT = 'VBBK' IMPORTING LV_LINES = LV_LINES1 ).
** LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
** CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
** CONCATENATE LV_TEXT LS_LINE-TDLINE INTO LV_TEXT SEPARATED BY SPACE.

FORMS.FPCLINE: FORM get_textname USING is_dlv_delnote TYPE ledlv_delnote
* Valid numbers for IF_TABLE: 1 text from sales organisation
* default: read text from shipping point
